message:
fix(runtime,store): enforce ACL gating and add dirty-flag mutation tracking

ACL Security (fr-runtime):
- Remove special ACL bypass check in is_command_authorized() that
  allowed non-admin users to execute ACL commands
- Add test verifying ACL commands are properly gated for non-admin users

Mutation Tracking (fr-store):
- Add dirty: u64 field to Store for tracking state-modifying operations
- Increment dirty counter on all mutation operations (SET, DEL, APPEND,
  SETBIT, LPUSH, RPUSH, SADD, ZADD, etc.)
- Only record AOF entries when dirty counter increases, reducing
  unnecessary persistence I/O

Server Refactoring:
- Extract execute_frame_internal() for cleaner frame execution and
  state tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
